origin.name: Kyrgyzstan
origin.source: FCDO Kyrgyzstan travel advice, updated 2025; British Embassy Bishkek guidance
origin.cremation_note: Cremation is available in Kyrgyzstan. Bringing ashes home to the UK is an option alongside full body repatriation.

destinations.name: United Kingdom
key_documents: Death certificate from State Registration Service (certified English translation required)
special_rules: Death must be registered with the State Registration Service promptly.
All Kyrgyz or Russian-language documentation requires certified English translation for UK acceptance.
The Prosecutor's Office orders post-mortem for suspicious or violent deaths.
An export permit from Kyrgyz authorities is required for all repatriations.
destinations.dest_reception: The UK funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. All documentation must be in certified English translation. The coroner for the district is notified. Straightforward cases proceed directly to funeral arrangements.
destinations.dest_consular_note: FCDO 24-hour emergency line: +44 (0)20 7008 5000. The British Embassy in Bishkek can register the death and advise on local funeral directors. They cannot pay for or arrange repatriation.
destinations.seo_title: Kyrgyzstan to UK Repatriation: Guidance for Families
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Kyrgyzstan. Repatriation to the UK takes 2-3 weeks. State Registration, translation, and export permits all handled. Contact us 24/7.
